global_context.scene_description: A cinematic editorial overhead shot of a single printed itemized receipt or invoice document on a dark walnut wood surface. The document is the only subject — single hero element, dramatic theatrical lighting from a single soft top-light, deep shadow falloff to near-black at the edges of the frame. The document looks like a clean professional HVAC invoice. At the top, a header: 'AC INSTALL — EMERGENCY DISPATCH'. Below that, a subheading: 'Issued during peak Phoenix demand'. Then a clean itemized table with right-aligned dollar amounts. The line items are: 'Standard install ........ $9,500.00', 'Summer peak surcharge .... +$2,500.00', 'Emergency dispatch fee ... +$1,500.00', 'After-hours premium ...... +$1,000.00'. A thin horizontal rule separator. Below the rule: 'TOTAL ............... $14,500.00' in bold black, larger font. Below the total, a small italic note in red: 'Off-season standard: $9,500'. Document is clean, modern professional invoice typography, no logo. Subtle realistic paper texture, slight curl at one corner. Single soft theatrical top-light catches the paper, edges of the frame fall to near-black. Mood: cold mathematical reveal — the line items make the markup undeniable. Editorial document still life with theatrical lighting, NOT documentary photo, NOT cartoon.

lighting.quality: theatrical, dramatic falloff to near-black at edges

composition.framing: near-overhead document shot, slight 3/4 tilt, document dominates 65% of frame
composition.focal_point: the bold TOTAL line at the bottom showing $14,500
